items.title: Listing rules on corporate governance to prevail over RBI’s for listed banks, clarifies SEBI
items.description: The informal guidance in the PNB case is expected to provide clarity to other regulated entities navigating overlapping governance frameworks of SEBI and RBI.

items.title: Nifty’s 25,880 wall: SBI Securities’ Sudeep Shah maps 26,000-26,200 path and flags two buys for next week
items.description: Traders should refrain from aggressive dip-buying in IT stocks and consider using rallies toward resistance as opportunities to sell until momentum improves, Sudeep Shah said.

items.title: Bharat Forge, Sona BLW, other auto ancillary stocks in focus as US offers tariff relief on auto parts
items.description: According to a joint India-US statement, New Delhi will be granted a preferential tariff rate quota on automotive parts that fall under the tariffs imposed.

items.title: Over 100 small-cap stocks jump up to 45% as broader indices' rally enters third week
items.description: During the week, the BSE Sensex rose 1,310.62 points, or 1.59 percent, to close at 83,580.40, while the Nifty50 gained 373.05 points, or 1.47 percent, to settle at 25,693.70.

items.title: Markets extend gains in Budget week; rupee rebounds
items.description: The Indian rupee snapped a three-week losing streak to end 133 paise higher at 90.66 on February 6.

items.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average breaks 50,000 level for first time
items.description: The index rose 1,206.95 points, or 2.47%, on Friday to finish at 50,115.67. The Dow is now up 4.3% for the year so far compared with a 1.3% gain for 2026 in the S&P 500 and a 0.9% decline for the year so far in the Nasdaq.

items.title: Promoter acquires over 0.5% stake in SG Finserve
items.description: Prehaps, SG Finserve shares might have reacted to the bulk deal, rising 7 percent to Rs 372.9 amid high volumes and forming long bullish candle on the daily charts.

items.title: Indian equities set for re‑rating, Sensex could hit 1,07,000 by 2026-end in bull case, Morgan Stanley says
items.description: Morgan Stanley said BSE Sensex could climb to 1,07,000 by December 2026 in its bull case, and 95,000 in its base case.

items.title: Tata Motors PV shares fall up to 3% as firm slips into loss in Q3: Should you buy, sell or hold?
items.description: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles reported a consolidated net loss of Rs 3,486 crore for Q3 FY26, as against a net profit of Rs 5,406 crore in Q3 FY25.
